prompt: A full-length mirror selfie of a beautiful young East Asian woman in her early 20s standing in a modern luxury apartment. She has very long, straight glossy black hair with soft side bangs falling past her waist. Fair porcelain skin, delicate features with soft makeup — large eyes, glossy lips in a soft neutral expression, a faint blush on her cheeks. She holds a black smartphone up in her right hand to take the mirror selfie, partially covering the upper part of her face, her left hand resting on her hip. She has an attractive hourglass figure — full bust, slim waist, curvy hips. She wears a cream-colored sequined spaghetti-strap camisole top with a low V-neckline that shimmers softly, paired with fitted white high-waisted shorts, and black strappy ankle-strap high-heeled sandals. She stands with her weight on one leg, hip cocked slightly, posing confidently in front of a large full-length mirror with a slim dark wood frame. Reflected behind her is a bright, elegant modern apartment interior — clean minimalist design, floor-to-ceiling windows with sheer curtains letting in warm natural daylight, pale marble or polished concrete floors, sleek contemporary furniture, soft neutral tones, tasteful decor. Warm natural light streams in from the windows, casting soft highlights across her figure and the floor. Shot on a phone in the mirror, full-body vertical framing, natural skin texture, slightly warm tones, the authentic look of a real mirror selfie in a stylish upscale apartment.
